# Shaun Burdick

> Shaun Burdick is a highly experienced Engineering Leader with over 20 years of software engineering expertise. He specializes in software architecture, backend development, agile methodologies, and team management. Shaun has a strong track record of delivering complex projects, improving engineering processes, and fostering innovation and collaboration.

## About

- [Name](https://shaunburdick.com/): Shaun Burdick
- [Role](https://shaunburdick.com/): Engineering Leader
- [Location](https://shaunburdick.com/): Syracuse, NY
- [Experience](https://shaunburdick.com/): 20+ years in software engineering
- [Occupations](https://shaunburdick.com/): Father, Husband, Leader, Engineer

## Expertise

- [Web Architecture and Design](https://shaunburdick.com/)
- [Large scale data collection](https://shaunburdick.com/)
- [API Design and Implementation](https://shaunburdick.com/)
- [Agile/Scrum team management](https://shaunburdick.com/)
- [Project Management](https://shaunburdick.com/)
- [Engineering Leadership](https://shaunburdick.com/)

## Links

- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/shaunburdick/): Professional profile and experience
- [GitHub](https://github.com/shaunburdick/): Open source projects and contributions
- [Calendar](https://zcal.co/shaunburdick): Schedule a meeting
- [Contact](https://shaunburdick.com/): Direct contact via the interactive console (the page renders a randomized, non-scrapable mailto link on each load)

## About this site

- [Source code](https://github.com/shaunburdick/shaunburdick.com): This site is open source on GitHub
- [Interactive terminal](https://shaunburdick.com/): The home page is a simulated retro VT terminal with hidden Easter eggs and achievements
